args.command:
config firewall address
edit "agent-192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_agent"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "agent-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
next
end
show firewall address
show firewall policy | grep -n "Deny_ICMP_from_agent" -n || show firewall policy
